parsed.title: Home Page
parsed.body_excerpt: Home Page Sign In Exporters Importers Indian Missions Abroad APEDA Internal User Sitemap FAQ A- A A+ Eng Exporters Importers Indian Missions Abroad Eng Exporters Importers Indian Missions Abroad About Us Indian Export Analytics Build your own Report Build your own Report - (Principal Commodities) All Export Destinations India Export Analytical Report India Production India Production State Wise Export Statistics-State/Port Quick Reports Global Trade Analytics Build your own Report All Export Destinations India vs Global Peers International Production Market Intelligence Market Report SPS Notifications TBT Notifications Market News Import Regulations Import Tariffs Country Profile United Arab Emirates Saudi Arabia Malaysia Bangladesh United States Vietnam Kuwait Iran United Kingdom Indonesia ... View more country profiles Trade Leads Sell Leads Buy Leads Register as an Importer Directory Exporters Packhouses Peanut Units Meat Units India’s contribution is % of World’s Import World’s Import: USD Million India’s Export: USD Million Major Contributors Almost Accounting for USD Million Major Contributors Almost Accounting for USD Million Percentage by value Percentage by quantity A Pillar of Economic Growth Highlighting its significant role in the global market and national economy India Exports Top 10 Export Destinations Top 10 Export Products APEDA Products All Agri Products Loading... Loading... 2025-26 Sectoral Insights India Export Trend (USD Million) Major Destinations (USD Million) Recent SPS Notification Issued BUY LEADS View All Trade Opportunities BUY LEADS Loading... View All SELL LEADS Loading... View All Market Insights DGFT Notificaiton Exporter Directory Food Safety and Standards Benefits for Exporters A unified solution offers information on importing countries interested in Indian imports, international agricultural production, statistics, international prices, and regulations and tariffs of importing countries. Additionally, the portal provides step-by-step guidance for exports, covering quality standards, packaging, labelling, warehousing and cold storage facilities, logistics, export documentation, government subsidies and incentives, Letter of Credit transactions, and buy/sell leads. Benefits for Importers It serves as a comprehensive platform for foreign buyers looking to import Indian agricultural products. It provides detailed information including Agri Products Gallery, Exporters Directory, Export/Import statistics, importing countries list, state-wise production data, quality measures, logistics support, and buy/sell leads. Developed by APEDA, it simplifies the sourcing process and enhances awareness of India's agricultural products for importers. Repository of Knowledge This portal serves as a repository of knowledge on international trade data, exports from India, and market intelligence for major products and key destinations. Subscribe for Exclusive Market Insights Get the latest export/import reports and market news delivered directly to your inbox Agri X change Agricultural and Processed Food Products Export Development Authority (APEDA) Ministry of Commerce & Industry, Govt. of India Total Visitors 2 1 6 8 3 5 5 Follow Us Contact Us 3rd Floor, NCUI Building 3, Siri Institutional Area, August Kranti Marg, (Opp. Asiad Village) New Delhi - 110 016, India 91-11-41486013/ 20863919/ 20867008 agriexchange[AT]apeda[DOT]gov[DOT]in Report an error © 2024 All Rights Reserved Privacy Policy | Disclaimer

parsed.title: Pardon Our Interruption
parsed.body_excerpt: Pardon Our Interruption Pardon Our Interruption As you were browsing something about your browser made us think you were a bot. There are a few reasons this might happen: You've disabled JavaScript in your web browser. You're a power user moving through this website with super-human speed. You've disabled cookies in your web browser. A third-party browser plugin, such as Ghostery or NoScript, is preventing JavaScript from running. Additional information is available in this support article . To regain access, please make sure that cookies and JavaScript are enabled before reloading the page. Please stand by We're getting everything ready for you. The page is loading, and you'll be on your way in just a few moments. Thanks for your patience!

If you are interested in submitting a bid for this tender, you must subscribe following the instructions in the user guide . If you have not registered a profile with this system, you can do so by following the link for Supplier Registration . If you already have a supplier profile, please access the negotiation using quicklink or please login to the Supplier Portal , then search for the negotiation using the reference number UNDP-TJK-00627 , following the instructions in the user guide . Introduction Case ref. No 131-2026-RFQ-UNDP-GF “Supply of food kits Interested suppliers must submit their offer directly in the system as instructed in the solicitation document, following the instructions in the available user guide. In case you have never registered before, you can register a profile using the registration link shared via the procurement notice and following the instructions in guides available in the UNDP website: https://www.undp.org/procurement/business/resources-for-bidders . Do not create a new profile if you already have one. Use the forgotten password feature in case you do not remember the password or the username from previous registration. Search for the specific tender using search filters and subscribe to the tender in order to get notifications in case of amendments of the tender document. If you need support with the online system, you can contact the contact details of this tender as indicated in the solicitation document. This RFQ provides for engagement of the local/national companies due to the mandatory national certification requirements! parsed.title: Procurement Notices - UNDP-UKR-01705 - 222_Batteries to quadcopter drone and Portable Automobile inverter
parsed.body_excerpt: Procurement Notices - UNDP-UKR-01705 - 222_Batteries to quadcopter drone and Portable Automobile inverter GLOBAL Procurement Notices About Us Procurement at UNDP UNDP Office of Procurement Our Guiding Principles UNDP Procurement Strategy & Sustainable Procurement Procurement Training & Certification For Suppliers How we buy What we buy Qualifications and eligibility Protest and sanctions Supplier code of conduct Quantum eTendering guidance Annual procurement statistics Resources for suppliers FAQ Contract Awards Search Notices Nav toggle About Us For Suppliers Contract Awards Search Notices Back About Us Procurement at UNDP UNDP Office of Procurement Our Guiding Principles UNDP Procurement Strategy & Sustainable Procurement Procurement Training & Certification For Suppliers Page Title How we buy What we buy Qualifications and eligibility Protest and sanctions Supplier code of conduct Quantum eTendering guidance Annual procurement statistics Resources for suppliers FAQ Back Select Language English FranÃ§ais EspaÃ±ol Home 222_Batteries to quadcopter drone and Portable Automobile inverter 222_Batteries to quadcopter drone and Portable Automobile inverter Procurement Process RFQ - Request for quotation Office UNDP-UKR - UKRAINE Deadline 09-Jul-26 @ 06:48 AM (New York time) Published on 25-Jun-26 @ 12:00 AM (New York time) Reference Number UNDP-UKR-01705 Contact Procurement Unit - procurement.ua@undp.org This specific tender is managed via the new supplier portal system of UNDP Quantum. If you are interested in submitting a bid for this tender, you must subscribe following the instructions in the user guide . If you have not registered a profile with this system, you can do so by following the link for Supplier Registration . If you already have a supplier profile, please access the negotiation using quicklink or please login to the Supplier Portal , then search for the negotiation using the reference number UNDP-UKR-01705 , following the instructions in the user guide . Introduction Dear Bidder, The United Nations Development Programme (UNDP) in Ukraine hereby invites you to submit a Quotation to the Request for Quotation (RFQ) UNDP-UKR-01705: Procurement of Batteries to quadcopter drone and Portable Automobile inverter. Interested suppliers must submit their offer directly in the system as instructed in the solicitation document, following the instructions in the available user guide. In case you have never registered before, you can register a profile using the registration link shared via the procurement notice and following the instructions in guides available in the UNDP website: https://www.undp.org/procurement/business/resources-for-bidders . Do not create a new profile if you already have one. Use the forgotten password feature in case you do not remember the password or the username from previous registration. Search for the specific tender using search filters and subscribe to the tender in order to get notifications in case of amendments of the tender document. Documents can be submitted in English or Ukrainian languages. Additional information: - If you need support with the online system, you can contact quantum.reg.ua@undp.org . Please always indicate reference to the number of the tender in subject . - Guides for suppliers: In case you do not have Supplier profile, please follow the link Registration of prospective bidder and be guided by Localized guide for Supplier profile registration Quantum Supplier registration brief manual UA v.4.pdf (undp.org) Localized guide for UNDP suppliers using the Quantum portal PowerPoint Presentation (undp.org) (UA) Global guide for UNDP suppliers using the Quantum portal PowerPoint Presentation (undp.org) (EN Localized guide for Supplier profile registration quantum-supplier-registration-brief-manual-ua-v.6.pdf (UA Global guide for Supplier profile registration and bid submission PowerPoint Presentation (undp.org) (EN) UNDP Quantum Supplier Guide Consolidated links document - If you have any problems with registration in Quantum , please send a request for assistance to email quantum.reg.ua@undp.org , procurement.ua@undp.org ( please indicate in subject of email the reference number of Quantum negotiation and/or title of assignment ). CLARIFICATIONS: Any request for clarification must be sent in writing via messaging functionality in the Quantum portal or to email procurement.ua@undp.org ( please indicate in subject of email the reference number of Quantum negotiation and title of assignment ). UNDP will respond in writing including an explanation of the query without identifying the source of inquiry. Requests for clarification from bidders will not be accepted any later than 3 (three) days before the submission deadline. Should you require further clarifications, kindly communicate using the messaging functionality in the Quantum system . ATTENTION: Quotations shall be submitted only through Quantum Portal . Quotations shall not be submitted to any email addre

If you are interested in submitting a bid for this tender, you must subscribe following the instructions in the user guide . If you have not registered a profile with this system, you can do so by following the link for Supplier Registration . If you already have a supplier profile, please access the negotiation using quicklink or please login to the Supplier Portal , then search for the negotiation using the reference number UNDP-HTI-00586 , following the instructions in the user guide . Introduction Veuillez indiquer si vous avez l'intention de soumettre une offre en créant un projet de réponse sans le soumettre directement dans le système. Cela permettra au système d'envoyer des notifications au cas où les exigences de l'offre seraient modifiées. Si vous avez besoin de plus de précisions, veuillez nous contacter en utilisant la fonction de messagerie du système. Les offres doivent être soumises directement dans le système en suivant ce lien : http://supplier.quantum.partneragencies.org/ en utilisant le profil que vous avez sur le portail. Si vous ne vous êtes jamais inscrit auparavant, vous pouvez enregistrer un profil en utilisant le lien d'inscription partagé via l'avis de recrutement et en suivant les instructions dans les guides disponibles sur le site Web du PNUD : https://www.undp.org/procurement/business/resources-for-bidders . Ne créez pas de nouveau profil si vous en avez déjà un. Utilisez la fonction de mot de passe oublié au cas où vous ne vous souviendriez pas du mot de passe ou du nom d'utilisateur de l'enregistrement précédent. parsed.body_excerpt: How to Choose Reliable Auto Electrical Parts Suppliers | ExportersIndia All Manufacturers Business Tips Trending Now B2B Agriculture Food & Beverages Fashion Health & Beauty Market Research More ☰ Search Blog Search Explore more categories All Automobile Industry News General Trade Construction & Real Estate Ayurveda & Herbal Product Chemical And Chemical Products Tools & Equipment Blog Business Tips How To Choose Reliable Auto Electrical Parts Suppliers And Manufacturers For Bulk Purchase How To Choose Reliable Auto Electrical Parts Suppliers And Manufacturers For Bulk Purchase Share Twitter WhatsApp Facebook Linkedin By: ExportersIndia Teams | in Business Tips | Last Updated: 20 May 2026 Every vehicle needs a working electrical system. From ignition to dashboard lights, each part must work properly. When you buy bulk auto electrical parts, the risk grows. One poor batch from auto electrical parts suppliers can cause delays, faulty performance, or bigger problems in your operations. The key to success is to pick the appropriate supplier. This blog maintains a low-key and easy-to-read tone. It demonstrates how to choose good materials, prevent errors, and maintain your labor organization and efficiency. The tips are relevant to guide you to better decisions and manage your daily operations with confidence, provided that you handle car electrical parts , auto electrical products, car electronic accessories or anything else Start With a Clear Picture of What You Need List everything that you need before calling a supplier. Do you require the Car Electric Parts, relays or wiring harnesses? Are you buying for Light Commercial Vehicles or Medium & Heavy Commercial Vehicles? A supplier good for car electronic accessories may not fit when you require vehicle wiring components. Plan for auto electrical products, car accessories, seat covers, or automobile interior accessories to keep fewer suppliers and make buying simple. Where to Find Genuine Auto Electrical Parts Suppliers Finding the right auto electrical parts suppliers is not always easy. The internet helps, but it also brings risk. Anyone can make a site and claim to sell Auto Electrical Products. So, choose carefully. ExportersIndia is a b2b platform that helps you find real suppliers. You can sort by product and location. Trade fairs also help you meet automotive electrical components manufacturers and check samples. Industry groups share trusted lists, which makes your search simple and clear. Certifications Are Not Optional When you work with automotive electrical components manufacturers, certifications matter. They show the supplier follows proper steps and checks quality at each stage. This helps reduce faults in car electric parts. ISO 9001 - Basic quality system for production IATF 16949 - Made for automotive parts and strict checks Product approvals - Needed for safety in different markets Always ask for proof. A trusted supplier will share documents without delay. If they avoid this, it is a clear risk. Select only those who go by the right standards and provide complete clarity. How to Evaluate Quality Before You Commit Do not skip the sample stage. Always ask for samples of auto electrical parts before you place a big order. Test them in real use. Check heat, load, and voltage levels. This matters more for medium & heavy commercial vehicles , where parts face tough use. Check each part closely. See if the connectors are strong and the wiring is proper. Match everything with the given specs. If you find any gap, take it seriously. Keep notes of your tests. This helps you compare future batches and maintain steady quality. Understanding Quality Control at the Source Good suppliers do not just test products at the end. They build quality checks into every stage of production. Ask any shortlisted supplier to walk you through their quality control process. A credible manufacturer will do so without hesitation. Stage What Happens Why It Matters Raw Material Inspection Copper, plastics, and alloys are checked before use Stops defects before production begins In-Process Testing Parts are tested during the assembly stage Catches problems early, reduces waste Final Functional Test Every finished part is powered on and checked Ensures parts work straight out of the box Environmental Stress Test Parts are exposed to heat, cold, and humidity Confirms performance in real driving conditions Stage What Happens Why It Matters Raw Material Inspection Copper, plastics, and alloys are checked before use Stops defects before production begins In-Process Testing Parts are tested during the assembly stage Catches problems early, reduces waste Final Functional Test Every finished part is powered on and checked Ensures parts work straight out of the box Environmental Stress Test Parts are exposed to heat, cold, and humidity Confirms performance in real driving conditions Pricing for Bulk Orders What to Watch Price is important, but do not depend on it only.
